Overview

Items are a selection of collectible game objects that are used throughout a variety of progression systems within Anime Expeditions. Items are primarily obtainable through gameplay, requiring the player to complete Stages, Quests or Achievements to earn. Upon earning Items, the player may typically exchange them through a Shop-like system to unlock stronger units or further overall progression.
